title: Supersede stale architecture decision
purpose: Demonstrate that a newer decision-memory can explicitly supersede an older architecture decision while preserving audit evidence.

seedMemory.text: Decision: store memory inside the OpenCode adapter.
Decision: keep memory storage in the local-first runtime while the OpenCode adapter stays thin.
supersedesText: Decision: store memory inside the OpenCode adapter.

task.prompt: State the current memory storage decision after superseding stale adapter ownership guidance.

expectedRecall: Decision: keep memory storage in the local-first runtime while the OpenCode adapter stays thin.
successCriteria: The memory-assisted path recalls only the current decision by default.
The stale decision is excluded from normal recall.
The recall log records a superseded memory id for audit evidence.
